_meta.status: PLACEHOLDER — Phase 4 plumbing stub, not attorney-verified
_meta.note: 45 CFR 164.520 required-elements boilerplate for a Notice of Privacy Practices. Every string below is a placeholder for attorney-drafted/verified language, not usable client-facing text as-is. See BUILD_PLAN.md 'Legal content the agent must not fabricate.'

uses_and_disclosures.treatment: PLACEHOLDER — describe how PHI is used/disclosed for treatment purposes
uses_and_disclosures.payment: PLACEHOLDER — describe how PHI is used/disclosed for payment purposes
uses_and_disclosures.healthcare_operations: PLACEHOLDER — describe how PHI is used/disclosed for healthcare operations

patient_rights: PLACEHOLDER — right to request restrictions on uses/disclosures (§164.522(a))
PLACEHOLDER — right to request confidential communications (§164.522(b))
PLACEHOLDER — right to inspect and copy PHI (§164.524)
PLACEHOLDER — right to an accounting of disclosures (§164.528)
PLACEHOLDER — right to a paper copy of the notice
PLACEHOLDER — right to be notified of a breach of unsecured PHI

complaint_rights.internal_complaint: PLACEHOLDER — describe how to file a complaint with the client
complaint_rights.hhs_complaint: PLACEHOLDER — describe the right to file a complaint with the Secretary of HHS, Office for Civil Rights
